title: Fiery Greek Yellow Pepper Flatbread
description: Charred, velvety flatbread studded with smoky yellow pepper and aromatic herbs for a comforting Greek twist.

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: extra virgin, for dough and brushing

instructions: In a bowl whisk together flour, yeast, sugar, salt and a pinch of smoked paprika.
Add warm water and olive oil, then knead the dough until smooth and elastic, about 8 minutes.
Cover the dough and let it rise until doubled in size, about 30 minutes.
Punch down the dough, divide into 4 equal portions and roll each into a 12-inch circle.
Heat a heavy skillet or griddle over medium-high heat and place a flattened dough in it.
Cook the flatbread until the bottom is golden and it starts to blister, about 3 minutes.
Flip the flatbread, brush the top with olive oil and sprinkle with chili flakes, oregano, and roasted yellow pepper slices.
Cook the other side until golden and the pepper is warm, about 2 minutes.
Remove from heat, let rest 1 minute, then cut into wedges and serve warm.
